zh.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當William FitzWilliam於大約1254年出生在英國越可爾艾姆利時，他的父親William FitzThomas21歲，母親Lady William FitzWilliam56歲。他於1296年與Isabel Maud Deincourt在英國英格蘭越可爾艾姆利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1338年3月4日之後在英國英格蘭，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William FitzWilliam于大约1254年出生在英国越可爾艾姆利时，他的父亲William FitzThomas21岁，母亲Lady William FitzWilliam56岁。他于1296年与Isabel Maud Deincourt在英国英格兰越可爾艾姆利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1338年3月4日之后在英国英格兰，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William FitzWilliam was born about 1254, in Emley, Yorkshire, England, his father, William FitzThomas, was 21 and his mother, Lady William FitzWilliam, was 56. He married Isabel Maud Deincourt in 1296, in Emley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. He died after 4 March 1338, in England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William FitzWilliam est né environ 1254, à Emley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William FitzThomas, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady William FitzWilliam, avait 56 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Maud Deincourt en 1296, à Emley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé après 4 mars 1338, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William FitzWilliam um 1254 in Emley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William FitzThomas 21 und seine Mutter Lady William FitzWilliam 56. Er hat 1296 in Emley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Isabel Maud Deincourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb nach 4. März 1338 in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzWilliam è nato il circa 1254 nel Emley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William FitzThomas, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady William FitzWilliam, aveva 56 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Maud Deincourt nel 1296, nel Emley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì dopo il 4 marzo 1338, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William FitzWilliamが約1254年にイギリスヨークシュアイアエムリーで生まれた時，父William FitzThomasは21歳，母Lady William FitzWilliamは56歳であった。1296年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエムリーでIsabel Maud Deincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1338年3月4日以後にイギリスイギリスで死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウ アンド クウスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스
ko.lifeSummary: William FitzWilliam(이)가 대략 1254년 영국 요르크실르 리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzThomas(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady William FitzWilliam(은)는 56세였다. 그는 1296년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리에서 Isabel Maud Deincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1338년 3월 4일 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzWilliam nasceu aproximadamente 1254, em Emley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzThomas, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady William FitzWilliam, tinha 56 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Maud Deincourt em 1296, em Emley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu após 4 de março de 1338, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William FitzWilliam родился около 1254 г. в местности эмли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William FitzThomas было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady William FitzWilliam, 56. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Maud Deincourt в 1296 г. в местности эмли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер после 4 марта 1338 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
